relations.note: Usage guidance for waves applies on top of the mandatory colorway/opacity construction rule.

quotes: Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
always preserve the layered, translucent quality

rules.intent: Preserve the brand's signature two-tone translucent wave motif and prevent unauthorized color mixing.
rules.rule_text: Fluid wave graphic devices come in two required colorway pairings, each available in long and short variants: Gold (#ffc60a) layered over Sunshine (#faa31b), or Sky Blue (#358CCB) layered over Deep Blue (#003D74). Construction is always a top wave layer at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 70%) over the base wave color, and this layered, translucent quality must always be preserved.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Guide flexible but on-brand placement of the wave motif across layouts.
rules.rule_text: Wave devices may be used alone or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth; only approved brand color values may be used for waves in any usage context.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Lock the approved masthead treatment for consistent brand presentation and legibility of logo placement.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold, masthead.gradient), with the logo mark placed at the lightest end of the gradient, is the only approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
